segments.text: They have often attacked me from my youth
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: They have often attacked me from my youth, but they have not prevailed against me
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The plowers plowed on my back; they made their furrows long
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: But the LORD is righteous; he has cut the cords of the wicked
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May all who hate Zion be put to shame and turned backward
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them be like the grass on the housetops, which withers before it grows up
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: With which the reaper does not fill his hand nor the binder of sheaves his arms
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Nor do those who pass by say, 'The blessing of the LORD be upon you! We bless you in the name of the LORD!'
segments.speaker: Psalmist
